creator: lioux@uol.com.br
text:
The modification motivating the PORTREVISION bump on Makefile
rev 1.44 

http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/mail/qpopper/Makefile?rev=1.44&content-type=text/x-cvsweb-markup

was the introduction of ipv6 support. Could you try compiling
qpopper without it to check if this is the problem?
I am submitting a patch that disables ipv6 support in the port.
	However, I can't reproduce your problem. Qpopper
has worked for local and overseas connections for the tests
I've conducted.
	Could you check if this is incidental to a particular
system? Do you any spare system to try this on? Any log
messages?

	Regards,

-- 
Mario S F Ferreira - UnB - Brazil - "I guess this is a signature."
lioux at ( freebsd dot org | linf dot unb dot br )
flames to beloved devnull@someotherworldbeloworabove.org
